series_metadata.series_description: Files contain the complete history of the bank or trust company, including Articles of Incorporation, Amendments to Articles, incorporation material and related changes, initial organizational requirements to become licensed to conduct bank or trust business in Ohio.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy was been checked quality and completeness ; Microform: microfilm in operating as well as off site storage facility (5) five years dissolution of bank or trust company. ; Electronic: electronic files five (5) years dissolution of bank or trust company
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
